name: rule g-ts-008: "Re-exports use export type" defined in generated-code-quality-standards/typescript/handbook.yaml with full E-8 metadata and provenance from {typescript-handbook}
command:
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards" --format json >out.json 2>err.txt && node -e 'const r=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out.json","utf8"));const rule=r.rules.find(x=>x.id==="g-ts-008");if(!rule){process.stderr.write("FAIL rule missing
");process.exit(1)}if(rule.source_file!=="typescript/handbook.yaml"){process.stderr.write("FAIL source_file="+rule.source_file+"
");process.exit(1)}const provOK=["typescript-handbook"].every(s=>rule.provenance.some(p=>p.source===s));if(!provOK){process.stderr.write("FAIL missing provenance source
");process.exit(1)}process.stderr.write("ok
")'
